mapper.select: SELECT * FROM assignments ORDER BY id

SELECT a.id as assignment_id, e.id as engineer_id, e.name as engineer_name, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, c.name as customer_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.role, a.status FROM assignments a INNER JOIN engineers e ON a.engineer_id = e.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id INNER JOIN projects p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id WHERE a.start_date >= #{from} AND a.start_date <= #{to} AND a.status IN ('PLANNED', 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY a.start_date, d.display_order, g.display_order, e.name

SELECT a.id as assignment_id, e.id as engineer_id, e.name as engineer_name, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, c.name as customer_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.role, a.status FROM assignments a INNER JOIN engineers e ON a.engineer_id = e.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id INNER JOIN projects p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id WHERE a.end_date >= #{from} AND a.end_date <= #{to} AND a.status IN ('PLANNED', 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY a.end_date, d.display_order, g.display_order, e.name

SELECT a.id as assignment_id, e.id as engineer_id, e.name as engineer_name, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, c.name as customer_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.role, a.status FROM assignments a INNER JOIN engineers e ON a.engineer_id = e.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id INNER JOIN projects p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id WHERE ( (a.start_date >= #{from} AND a.start_date <= #{to}) OR (a.end_date >= #{from} AND a.end_date <= #{to}) ) AND a.status IN ('PLANNED', 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY a.start_date, a.end_date, e.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assignments (project_id, engineer_id, start_date, end_date, role, billing_rate, cost_rate, working_hours_per_month, status) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{engineerId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{role}, #{billingRate}, #{costRate}, #{workingHoursPerMonth}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE assignments SET project_id = #{projectId}, engineer_id = #{engineerId}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, role = #{role}, billing_rate = #{billingRate}, cost_rate = #{costRate}, working_hours_per_month = #{workingHoursPerMonth}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id as assignment_id, e.id as engineer_id, e.name as engineer_name, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, c.name as customer_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.role, a.status, a.billing_rate FROM assignments a INNER JOIN engineers e ON a.engineer_id = e.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id INNER JOIN projects p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id WHERE a.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY a.start_date, e.name

SELECT a.id as assignment_id, e.id as engineer_id, e.name as engineer_name, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, c.name as customer_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.role, a.status, a.billing_rate FROM assignments a INNER JOIN engineers e ON a.engineer_id = e.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id INNER JOIN projects p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id WHERE a.engineer_id = #{engineerId} ORDER BY a.start_date DESC

SELECT e.id, e.employee_number as employeeNumber, e.name, e.email, e.phone, e.skill_set as skillSet, e.experience_years as experienceYears, e.employment_status as employmentStatus, e.group_id as groupId, g.name as groupName, d.name as departmentName FROM engineers e LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id WHERE e.employment_status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT engineer_id FROM assignments WHERE status IN ('PLANNED', 'ACTIVE') AND start_date <= #{date} AND end_date >= #{date} ) ORDER BY d.display_order, g.display_order, e.name

SELECT a.id as assignment_id, e.id as engineer_id, e.name as engineer_name, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, c.name as customer_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.role, a.status, a.billing_rate FROM assignments a INNER JOIN engineers e ON a.engineer_id = e.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id INNER JOIN projects p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id WHERE e.group_id = #{groupId} AND a.status IN ('PLANNED', 'ACTIVE') AND a.start_date <= #{to} AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= #{from}) ORDER BY p.name, a.start_date, e.name
